item.title: RERA - Major Benefits of New RERA act for Home buyers
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The purpose of RERA act is to protect the home-buyers and to boost the investments in the real estate sector. These Regulations will apply to all ongoing projects and future projects where the area of land exceeds five hundred square meters and the number of apartments proposed to be developed exceed eight inclusive of all phases.

What is RERA ?

RERA was enacted by the Indian government to regulate the real estate sector and address issues like delays in project delivery, unfair practices, and lack of transparency. RERA represents Real Estate Regulatory Authority, all its provision came into existence from 1 May 2016. The act was passed by the Indian parliament upper house (Rajya Sabha) in March 10, 2016 and came into force on May 2017 to make the home buying process smooth and straightforward.

The primary objectives of RERA are:

  1. Protecting Home Buyers: Ensuring that the interests of home buyers are protected.
  2. Promoting Transparency: Mandating clear information on projects and builders.
  3. Ensuring Timely Completion: Enforcing deadlines for project completion to avoid delays.
  4. Creating a Grievance Redressal System: Establishing a mechanism for home buyers to address their complaints.

Know About RERA Key Terms

The terms like carpet area, built up area and super built up can be confusing and may sound similar. As we know the cost of the property depends on the total square foot measurement and built in terms of RERA.

What is RERA Carpet Area ?

RERA Carpet area is an available area within the walls of a property. The carpet area is combination of area of bedroom, living room, balconies and toilets excluding balcony and terrace area but encompass the area covered by the internal partition walls.

Understanding the carpet area is essential as it directly influence the property 's value. The only difference between carpet area and RERA carpet area is the thickness of the inner partition walls. RERA Carpet area is 5 % more than the general carpet area.

How RERA carpet area is calculated for projects under RERA,

RERA carpet area = Net area of the flat ( excluding external walls, terrace area, balcony area ) + Internal partition walls area. 

What is Built up area ?

The total area of a building includes the combined measurements of the carpeted space, as well as the areas occupied by the exterior and interior walls, balcony, staircase, and livable area. The built-up area is usually 10 to 15 % more than carpet area.

The built up area is calculated as follows, Built up area = Carpet area + Wall areas + Terrace and balcony + Corridor

What is Super Built up area ?

Based on RERA regulations, Super built-up areas are quoted as saleable areas and apartments are charged based on this value. The property features a private built-up space along with shared areas such as elevators, hallways, staircases, recreational facilities, and other common amenities. The super built up area  is usually 25-30 % more than the built up area. The super built area does not include lofts, parks, driveaway, garden, play hub, roof terrace and water tank. The build up area and super build up area are not considered while determining the property value.

The Super built up area is calculated as follows,
  1. Super Built up area = Carpet area ( 1 + loading factor)
  2. Super built up area = Built up area + Proportionate Common area 

Have you heard about loading factor ?

According to the RERA, the difference between the super built-up area and the carpet area of the flat is known as the Loading Factor. The loading factor for the extravagance apartments are would be below 60%.

The loading factor is calculated as follows, Loading factor = Super built up area - Carpet area

FSI - Floor Space Index

FSI, which is one of the most important aspects of Real estate. FSI is known as Floor Space Index. FSI and FAR are almost similar but denoted differently. It is maximum allowable area that a promoter or developer can construct on a particular plot of land. Floor Space Index is restrained based on city zone, type of building, and other amenities. Floor Area Ratio can vary in the same location based on the number of floors of the buildings.

The formula for FSI - Floor Space index is given below,

The computation of FSI - Floor Space Index can be done using two attributes plot area and total floor area of all  floors of the building.

Floor Space Index = Total Floor Area of all floors of the building/Plot Area *100

Floor Area Ratio = Total Floor Area of all Floors of the Building/Plot area

Benefits of TNRERA Act

1. With the mandatory registration of every project with RERA, 70 % of the funds raised must be deposited in a separate bank account (Escrow Account). They can't move the same for another project or investment.

2. The Advance payments for any real estate project is around 10 % of the project's cost. This benefits the customer to source the funds on time.

3. RERA has regularized the measurement of carpet area, based on which real estate developers can sell their properties. The measurement of property space are standardized across the nation, allowing buyers to compare properties effortlessly. The properties having carpet area of more than 500 square meters, the builder / promoters has to register it under RERA.
4. Earlier, the promoters / developer used to charge for the built up and super built up area. under RERA Carpet area has been defined and selling the property based on super build up area has been forbidden and the cost of the project solely depends on the carpet area.
5. The one of the main benefit of RERA is that home buyers has all rights to the property information and project details.
6. Another important benefit is that, Real estate in the past has been known for defaulting on the project delivery dates with many home buyers waiting for more than two to three years than the promised time of possession. 7. Earlier in the real estate industry, The building handover has not been done as expected. After the RERA Act, the builder has to strictly adhere to the project delivery timeline. If not, the developer has to pay heavy compensation to home buyer.

Understanding RERA and its provisions is essential when buying a new home. It empowers you as a buyer, ensuring transparency, timely delivery, and protection of your rights. Always verify that the project is RERA-registered, review all documentation carefully, and stay informed about your rights and the builder’s obligations. This knowledge will help you make a confident and secure investment in your new home.

Home buyers can view all the RERA certified projects and agents by visiting the official RERA website. You can easily find comprehensive information state wise at https://rera.tn.gov.in/

Additionally, we take pride in ensuring that all our projects are RERA certified, providing you with the assurance of transparency, reliability, and adherence to regulatory standards. Our commitment to quality and compliance means you can trust us to deliver on our promises, giving you peace of mind when investing in your new home.

FAQs - Frequently Asked Questions

1. What advantages does RERA offer to home buyers?

RERA benefits home buyers by ensuring transparency, timely project delivery. It mandates financial protection through escrow accounts and promotes standardized practices, ensuring quality and accountability in real estate transactions.

2. Are all our real estate projects are registered under RERA?

Yes, all Visvas Promoters real estate projects are registered under RERA, ensuring transparency and compliance with regulations. Discover our story, mission, and the people behind our success as the best builder in Madurai on our About Us page. Click here to explore what sets us apart.

3.  How does RERA benefits first time Home Buyers?

RERA benefits first-time home buyers by ensuring transparency, timely possession, value based pricing, high construction standards. It also gives them a way to solve problems if anything goes wrong, making them feel more confident and secure about buying property.

4. Can builder make changes to the project plan after RERA registration? Any drastic alteration in the project plan post registration require the consent of two third of the buyers and must be approved by the RERA authority.

5. How can I check if a project is RERA registered?

To check, visit the official RERA website of your respective state and search for the project using its name, developer's name and registration number.  This ensures transparency and helps verify the project's compliance with RERA regulations before making any commitments.

6. Can builders charge for carpet area or super built up area? Under RERA, builders are allowed to charge based only on the carpet area, which is the net usable floor area of an apartment. Charging for super built-up area is not permissible.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: { "@context": "http://schema.org", "@type": "BlogPosting", "headline": "RERA - Major Benefits of New RERA act for Home buyers", "description": "Explore the major benefits of the Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act (RERA) for home buyers in India.", "articleBody": "The Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act, commonly known as RERA, stands as a pivotal legislation introduced by the Indian government to revolutionize the real estate sector. Enacted to protect the interests of home-buyers and enhance transparency and accountability within the industry, RERA has significantly reshaped the dynamics of property transactions across the country. RERA, which stands for Real Estate Regulatory Authority, came into effect on May 1, 2017, marking a watershed moment for the real estate market in India. The act was passed by the Rajya Sabha, the upper house of the Indian Parliament, on March 10, 2016. Its primary objectives include regulating the real estate sector, ensuring timely delivery of projects, preventing unfair practices, and promoting investor confidence. Key provisions of RERA include the mandatory registration of real estate projects exceeding 500 square meters or involving more than eight apartments. This requirement aims to bring transparency and accountability to project development, providing home-buyers with greater assurance and legal protection. RERA has also introduced stringent guidelines for builders and developers, emphasizing the timely completion of projects and the utilization of funds collected from home-buyers solely for the designated project. The act establishes Real Estate Regulatory Authorities in each state and union territory to oversee the implementation of its provisions and adjudicate disputes, further bolstering consumer rights in the real estate market. In conclusion, RERA represents a landmark legislation aimed at fostering a fair and equitable environment for both home-buyers and developers in India’s real estate landscape.", "publisher": { "@type": "RealEstateAgent", "name": "Visvas Promoters", "url": "https://lawngreen-walrus-520777.hostingersite.com/", "description": "Visvas Promoters is one of the most trusted builders in Madurai, renowned for delivering high-quality properties.", "address": { "@type": "PostalAddress", "streetAddress": "84, Tpk Road, Vasudhara Enclave, Andalpuram", "addressLocality": "Madurai", "addressRegion": "Tamil Nadu", "postalCode": "625003", "addressCountry": "India" } } }

item.title: Flats in Madurai
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Flats in Madurai - Why They Are a Smart Choice Over Villas or Apartment

When considering a property investment in Madurai, you may find yourself deciding between a flat or apartment, a villa, or an independent house. With many apartments in Madurai, there are plenty of options to choose from. Each option has its merits, but flats often stand out due to several practical reasons. Let’s delve into the advantages of buying flats and why they might be a better option for you.

Advantages of Buying Flats in Madurai

Affordability

Flats are generally more affordable than villas or independent houses. This makes them more accessible to a wider range of buyers, including first-time homeowners and young professionals.

Maintenance

In a flat, maintenance of common areas like gardens, corridors, and amenities is usually handled by the housing society. This reduces the burden of upkeep on individual homeowners.

Amenities

Many modern apartment complexes come with a host of amenities such as swimming pools, gyms, playgrounds, and security systems. These facilities can significantly enhance the quality of life.

Security

Flats often offer better security compared to independent houses, with features like gated communities, CCTV surveillance, and 24/7 security personnel.

Community Living

Living in a flat can foster a sense of community, with neighbors in close proximity and common areas to interact. This can be particularly beneficial for socializing and networking.

Location

Flats are usually located in prime areas with better access to essential services such as schools, hospitals, shopping center's, and public transport.

Madurai apartment for sale - Why Choose Flats Over Villas or Houses

Cost Efficiency

Residential flats are generally more cost-effective, offering a range of amenities and services at a lower cost compared to villas or independent houses. This makes them a practical choice for budget-conscious buyers looking for property for sale.

Low Maintenance

The collective maintenance system of flats reduces individual responsibilities and expenses associated with maintaining a property, making it a convenient choice for busy professionals and the elderly.

Safety and Security

With advanced security measures and the presence of a community, flats provide a safer living environment, which is particularly important for families with children and elderly members.

Urban Living

Flats are often situated in well-developed urban areas, providing easy access to workplaces, educational institutions, healthcare facilities, and entertainment options. This makes daily life more convenient and reduces commuting times.

Investment Potential

Flats in prime locations tend to have good resale value and rental income potential, making them a sound investment option. The demand for rental flats in cities like Madurai is consistently high.

While the choice between a flat and a villa or house ultimately depends on personal preferences and lifestyle needs, flats offer a compelling mix of affordability, convenience, and amenities. item.title: Residential and commercial Land / Plots for sale in Madurai
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Residential Plots for sale in Madurai | Emerging Areas for Residential Land Buyers in 2024

Before diving into property purchases, it’s necessary to understand the local real estate market. Madurai’s real estate zone has been growing steadily, with developments in both residential and commercial areas.

1. Research the Area 

Location: Explore the various plots in Madurai's popular localities for your next investment.  Research different localities in Madurai to find one that suits your needs. Consider factors like proximity to work, educational institutions, healthcare facilities, and transportation.

Infrastructure: Look into the infrastructure development plans in the area. Upcoming projects and developments can influence property values.

Neighborhood: Visit the area at different times of the day to gauge the living conditions and safety.

2. Legal and Documentation Check

Title Deed: Ensure the seller has a clear title deed. It should be free from legal disputes and encumbrances.

Land Use: Verify the land use classification (residential, commercial, agricultural) as per the Master Plan and ensure it aligns with your intended use.

Encumbrance Certificate: Obtain and review the encumbrance certificate to ensure there are no legal liabilities attached to the property in Madurai.

Land Records: Check the land records with the local sub-registrar office or online to confirm ownership and past transactions.

Approval: Ensure the plot has all necessary approvals from local authorities like the Madurai Corporation, and check if it has been properly converted from agricultural to residential land, if applicable.

3. Verification of Seller

Identity Proof: Verify the identity of the seller and cross-check their ownership documents.

Previous Transactions: Check the history of the property to ensure there are no disputes or pending dues.

Legal Standing: Ensure the seller is not involved in any legal issues or disputes related to the property.

4. Financial Considerations

Budget: Determine your budget, including the cost of the plot, registration fees, and any additional expenses like stamp duty and legal fees.

Payment Terms: Be clear about the payment terms and ensure that all transactions are documented properly.

Loans: If you are financing the purchase through a loan, ensure the property is eligible for loans from banks or financial institutions.

5. Inspection and Due Diligence

Site Inspection: Conduct a thorough site inspection to check for any issues with the land, such as drainage problems or environmental concerns.

Survey: Get the land surveyed by a professional to confirm its boundaries and ensure there are no encroachments on the plot area.

Utilities: Verify the availability of essential utilities like water, electricity, and sewage systems.

6. Legal Formalities

Sale Agreement: Draft a sale agreement outlining all terms and conditions, including the payment schedule and any contingencies.

Registration: Complete the registration process at the local sub-registrar office. Ensure all documents are signed and verified.

Stamp Duty: Pay the required stamp duty as per the government norms. It is usually calculated as a percentage of the sale value.

7. Post-Purchase Steps

Title Transfer: Ensure the title of the property is transferred to your name and update the land records.

Property Taxes: Get the property registered in your name with the local municipal authority and start paying property taxes on your newly acquired land for sale.

Developments: If you plan to build on the plot, check for necessary approvals and permits from local authorities.

when it comes to investing in land, understanding the different types of land / plots available is elementary for making informed decisions. Each types has it own benefits and challenges, depending on your investment goals and types of requirement. Here are the foremost categories to consider.

Residential plot vs Commercial plot

Buying a Residential Plot: This category includes plots designated for building homes, whether single-family residences, townhouses, or multi-family units. Investing in residential land can be an attractive option due to the ongoing demand for housing. The corner plots are expensive than the other plots in the area. As urban areas grow and populations increase, the need for residential development remains raised. Buyers should consider factors such as proximity to schools, amenities, prime location and public transportation, as these can significantly impact property value.

Buying a Commercial Plot: Commercial land is designated for business purposes, including retail spaces, office buildings, and warehouses. This type of investment can yield higher returns due to potential rental income and business growth. However, commercial land investments typically require a more in-depth understanding of zoning regulations, the prices & the behaviors of producers and consumers. Investors should assess factors such as foot traffic, local economic conditions, and the overall business climate in the area.

item.content:encoded:
Top Residential Project in Madurai - New projects for sale

Madurai, with its rich cultural heritage and booming infrastructure, has emerged as one of the prime locations for real estate investment in Tamil Nadu. Whether you’re looking for luxury villas, affordable apartments, Madurai has something to offer for everyone. Here’s a closer look at some of the top residential projects in this vibrant city.

Why choose Madurai as the location for your next home, built by the best builders?

Madurai, often referred to as the "Temple City," is more than just a cultural and historical hub. It has steadily emerged as a prime location for real estate investment, offering a blend of modern conveniences and timeless charm. Here are some compelling reasons why Madurai could be the perfect place for your next home:

1. Rich Cultural Heritage Madurai is steeped in history and tradition. The city is home to numerous ancient temples, including the renowned Meenakshi Amman Temple, which attracts visitors from all over the world. Living in Madurai means being part of a community that deeply values its cultural roots.

2. Affordable Cost of Living Compared to other major cities in Tamil Nadu, Madurai offers a relatively lower cost of living. This affordability extends to real estate, making it possible to find high-quality homes at more reasonable prices.

3. Thriving Infrastructure Madurai has seen significant infrastructure development in recent years. From well-maintained roads and public transport to modern healthcare facilities and educational institutions, the city ensures a comfortable and convenient lifestyle.

4. Educational Institutions The city boasts some of the best educational institutions in the region, including Madurai Kamaraj University, Thiagarajar College, and American College. This makes it an ideal place for families with children seeking quality education.

5. Economic Growth and Opportunities Madurai is not just a cultural hub but also an economic powerhouse. The city has a growing economy driven by industries such as textiles, automotive, and IT. This growth provides ample job opportunities for residents.

6. Serene and Scenic Environment Madurai offers a peaceful and serene environment, with its picturesque landscapes and green spaces. The city's climate is generally pleasant, making it an ideal place for those who appreciate a tranquil lifestyle.

7. Community and Connectivity The people of Madurai are known for their warmth and hospitality. The city fosters a strong sense of community, making it easy for new residents to feel at home. Additionally, Madurai is well-connected by road, rail, and air, ensuring seamless connectivity to other parts of the country.

8.Real Estate Potential With the ongoing development and increasing demand for residential properties, investing in real estate in Madurai is a promising prospect. The city offers a variety of housing options, from luxury villas to affordable apartments, catering to diverse preferences and budgets.

5.Controlled Access Points - Gated communities have controlled entrances to minimize unauthorized entry.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: I've been exploring football wagering for a few years now, and I must admit, it's an interesting way to get involved with the sport. One of the secrets to successful betting is analyzing statistics. In my view, if all football fans spent effort on reviewing match histories, team form, and key players, their success rate could improve significantly. Football predictions is not just about luck; it's about analysis. For instance, if a team has excellent goalkeepers but is weak in attack, it's smart to bet on under 2.5 goals. In contrast, matches between attack-focused squads often lead to high scores. An additional tip to consider is the strategy. Simple wagers carry less risk than parlays, but the latter might result in huge wins if you’re lucky. Don't overlook live betting options, as they might provide great value as the match unfolds. Remember: Bet responsibly! Avoid emotional betting, and always manage your bankroll. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned bettor, adapting to different strategies is what makes between winning and losing. Happy betting, and make the most of the beautiful game! my website :: прогнозы футбол ставка

item.title: Investments and Diversification at Visvas
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Investments and Diversification at Visvas

Embracing Innovation and Strategic Growth

At Visvas, we are committed to a strategy that combines innovation, sustainability, and technological advancement. Our approach to investments is spearheaded by our company promoters, who are accredited angel investors with a keen eye for potential and a deep understanding of various market dynamics. This page is dedicated to showcasing our diverse investment portfolio, which extends beyond traditional real estate to include a range of dynamic and pioneering companies. Each investment reflects our ethos and commitment to fostering growth and innovation in various sectors.

Our Investment Portfolio

  1. Buyofuel
    • Sector: Biofuel Marketplace
    • Overview: Buyofuel is revolutionizing the biofuel sector by connecting suppliers, manufacturers, and consumers in a comprehensive online marketplace. It aims to streamline the biofuel industry, making sustainable and clean energy sources more accessible.
    • Impact: By addressing the fragmentation in supply and demand, Buyofuel contributes to a more sustainable and emission-free environment. Their growth is marked by substantial equity funding and partnerships with key players in various sectors.
  2. V S Mani & Co
    • Sector: Food & Beverage
    • Overview: Specializing in authentic South Indian filter coffee and snacks, V S Mani & Co merges traditional recipes with modern sales strategies. Their products are sold through multiple channels, including online platforms and supermarkets.
    • Growth: The company has shown remarkable growth in sales, driven by a focus on quality and traditional flavors, appealing to a wide consumer base in India.
  3. Sarcon Technologies
    • Sector: Event Technology & Digital Transformation
    • Overview: Sarcon Technologies provides advanced solutions for event management with a focus on virtual and hybrid events. Their platform offers features like 3D virtual environments and comprehensive event management tools.
    • Synergy with Visvas: The technology aligns with Visvas's real estate focus, particularly in virtual real estate expos and 3D property showcases, enhancing customer engagement in the property market.
  4. Crib
    • Sector: Real Estate Tech
    • Overview: A Bengaluru-based startup, Crib is transforming the paying guest and hostel business using technology. Their platform aids landlords in managing operations and offers efficient solutions for tenant management.
    • Expansion: With plans to expand across major Indian cities, Crib's innovative approach is redefining urban living solutions for students and young professionals.
  5. AI Event Manager
    • Sector: Event Technology & AI-Powered Digital Experiences
    • Overview: AI Event Manager delivers next-gen event management solutions built from the ground up with AI at the core. From smart attendee matchmaking and AI-driven lead scoring to automated content generation and personalized user journeys, the platform transforms how virtual and hybrid events are executed. It also features immersive 3D environments and intelligent automation across planning, marketing, and analytics.
    • Synergy with Visvas: Perfectly aligned with Visvas’s real estate vision, AI Event Manager supercharges virtual expos and 3D property showcases using AI to personalize visitor experiences, optimize booth engagement, and deliver actionable insights—elevating how properties are marketed and sold.
  6. The ePlane Company
    • Sector: Urban Air Mobility
    • Overview: An IIT Madras-incubated venture, The ePlane Company is at the forefront of developing electric air taxis and cargo transport aircraft. The e200 eVTOL vehicle is designed for urban air mobility, offering a sustainable and efficient commuting solution.
    • Potential: This innovative technology has the potential to transform urban commuting, aligning with Visvas’s vision of embracing cutting-edge technological solutions in urban development.

Our Vision for the Future

Our investment philosophy at Visvas is driven by a desire to contribute to sectors that show promise for a sustainable future. We are proud to support businesses that are not only leaders in their respective fields but also share our values of innovation and sustainability. By diversifying our investment portfolio, we aim to stay at the forefront of industry trends while making a positive impact on society and the environment.

item.title: CREDAI Fairpro 2026 - Madurai Property Expo for your Dream home
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Confederation of Real Estate Developers' Associations of India (CREDAI) was established in the year 1999. Credai has successfully brought majority of the private property developer under single roof.  This premier real estate exhibition promises to showcase the latest trends, developments, and opportunities in the Madurai's property market, bringing together key players, developers, investors, and homebuyers.

Whether you’re looking to invest in a new property, seeking to understand market dynamics, or simply exploring your options around real estate market, the exhibition presents an invaluable networking platform. You’ll meet prominent developers, legal advisors, financial consultants, and other industry experts who can guide you through your real estate journey.

From Affordable to Luxurious housing option, Credai display a wide range of options, all in one store. There are various exhibitors who offers both category of Residential and Commercial preference. Whether you’re a first-time homebuyer or a adept investor, there’s something for everyone.

  • Residential Properties: Affordable flats, gated communities, luxury villas, and more.
  • Commercial Properties: Office spaces, co-working environments, and retail developments.
  • Luxury Properties: High-end homes, lavish apartments, and upscale projects.

Credai Madurai Fair 2025 happened at Tamukkam Convention Centre from January 31 to February 2.

Visvas has earned a reputation of excellence in property development across 25 years, A household name in Madurai. Visvas' projects have become synonymous with trust, convenience and comfort. Today Visvas has earned 4000 + Happy customers.

Lets look at the project we displayed at the Credai Fairpro 2025 - Madurai 's best real estate expo.

1. Ajita - Luxury 3 & 4 BHK Villas - Thuvarimaan

There is always huge demand for villa in and around Madurai, we have already completed 131 villas in the same sector. In the year 2024, we launched Ajita phase I, Following its overwhelming success and complete sell-out, we are excited to announce the launch of Ajita Phase 2, offering even more exclusive opportunities for home buyers.

2. Aparna - Compact Apartments - Thuvarimaan

Aparna is located at the same community as Ajita, it focus more on the compact Apartments. Aparna has different configuration of 2 BHK, 1 BHK and studio homes. The super build up area ranging from 327 sft to 994 sft and carpet area ranging from 249 sft to 712 sft. It has been planned for about 50 2 BHK apartments, 28 1 BHK apartments and 12 studio units. Aparna has experienced a rapid turnover of apartments, with bookings being secured at an exceptional pace.

3. Madhyapuri - Premium Villa sized Apartments - Ellis Nagar

Madhyapuri is located in the prime location, at the heart of the city. Madhyapuri, your dream home is very accessible, 2 mins from by-pass road, 5 mins from Madurai junction, 8 from Meenakshi Amman temple and 5 mins from Periyar Bus stand.

4. Vibhava H block - Ponmeni

Ponmeni is one of the beautiful places to own a house in Madurai. It has social and physical infrastructure and places of appearance. Visvas Vibhava has all the basic amenities and distance from Vibhava to Jeevana and Dolphin school is around 1.1 to 1.5 KMs. Vibhava, one phase is ready to move flat. The H-Block is nearly booked and available for sale.

5. Virat - 2 BHK Apartments - Vilangudi

VIRAT, which is located at Vilangudi, Madurai. Virat C & D are part of Visthara Enclave. The flats are located in the prime location, making it easy and convenient for commuting or running errands. Distance from Virat to Adyapana school is around 200 M, Fatima College is around 3.6 KMS and to Kalavasal its around 5.1 KMS. Virat encompasses amenities such as 24hrs water supply, 24 hrs Backup Electricity, Bank/ATM, Covered car parking, fire safety, Landscaped Garden, Maintenance staff, Play area, Rain water harvesting, Temple and Security personnel. This makes a safe and secure community for the individual to inhabit.

6. Vaaruni - Residential & Commercial Plots - Vilangudi

Vaaruni Enclave consists of Commercial and Residential land areas, ready for construction in Kovil Pappakudi, available for sale in the Madurai main. Investing in a plot is not just a step towards building your dream home; it’s also a smart investment. The property market in Madurai is on the rise, and plots in well-planned developments are highly sought after. From the Prime location of Madurai, Purchasing a plot now can yield significant returns in the future.

CREDAI Fairpro 2025 is not just any event, an opportunity to know the future of real estate in and around Madurai. Whether you’re a homebuyer, an investor, or simply someone interested in the real estate market, this event will provide you with the Best deals, resources, knowledge, and opportunities to take your real estate journey to the next level.

Check out for more details on our YouTube channel –https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

Contact Visvas Promoters to know more about the projects in details or call us to book for site visit today.
